title: Occupational Health and Safety Mission and Vision
content:
Occupational Health and Safety Mission and Vision

MISSION

Our mission is to follow the legal legislation on occupational health and safety in the international arena, in our country, and to act in accordance with professional ethical rules, to take all necessary measures to ensure occupational safety in an enterprise, to perform risk analysis of the institution it works with, and to take necessary measures to prevent risks, business To raise individuals who are sensitive to the events on the agenda and follow developments.

VISION

The vision of our program is to gain new perspectives on Occupational Health and Safety training, both in our country and then in the world; Creating Occupational Health and Safety Culture; to give our students a good education at European standards; to raise graduates who will be found in services that will increase the welfare level of our country.
